external_tasks.title: Approve email outreach to Professional Office Cleaning Hungary

payload.subject: One competing form on your English contact page
payload.body:
Hi Csaba,

I was reviewing Professional Office Cleaning Hungary's English enquiry journey and noticed a small conversion issue on the contact experience.

A general website-feedback route competes with the detailed quote request, even though the quote form is the stronger buyer action and promises a preliminary response within 24 hours. For an international office manager, those competing routes can make the next step less immediate. I also noticed a duplicated trust label on the English homepage.

I noted three focused form-hierarchy and English content-QA fixes. Happy to send the short review if useful.

Best,
Emmanuel Ehigbai
BridgeWorks
payload.commercial_gap: The English enquiry journey gives a general website-feedback route prominence alongside the detailed quote request, while a duplicated trust label remains visible on the homepage. This creates a narrow conversion and content-QA opportunity for international office managers without implying that the overall site or funnel is weak.
payload.proof_to_use: No proof in the first touch; hold the anonymized Central European B2B services proof for a relevant follow-up.
payload.risk_notes: Recheck the page hierarchy, duplicate label, and public email immediately before send. Do not imply the overall funnel is weak or pitch a rebuild.
payload.approval_scope: Approving authorizes only this exact destination, subject, and body.

2026-07-23-batch-01:nimaz-aesthetic.reason: The tracker phone and address are supported. The user-supplied Google rating and review count were not independently reverified in this pass.

2026-07-23-batch-01:professional-office-.reason: Exact destination and proposed copy passed the local preparation contract.

2026-07-23-batch-01:expert-cleaning-serv.reason: The liquidation signal is sufficient to remove this record from the active prospect lane.

2026-07-23-batch-01:first-facility-hunga.reason: This is a larger international group, so likely sales effort and approval cycles are higher than the first-wave SME lane.

2026-07-23-batch-01:icon-real-estate-man.reason: No sufficiently sharp commercial gap was established for first-wave outreach.
